case_title: PATEL, N. R. D/B/A HENRY HOTEL VS. SHAY BARKER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. D/B/A HENRY HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARKER, SHAY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 6TH STREET #403, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS.**
